name: First Martial Law — Abrogation of the 1956 Constitution
era: The 1956 Constitution and the First Martial Law (1956–1962)
key_provisions: Constitution abrogated; assemblies dissolved; parties banned
Country placed under martial law for the first time
Ayub Khan: CMLA, then President from 27 October 1958
demise: Martial law lifted on 8 June 1962, when Ayub's own constitution came into force.
